description: Bug Hunt military weapons - Compendium p.179

weapons.name: Service Pistol
weapons.description: Standard-issue sidearm carried by all troopers.

weapons.name: Hand Cannon
weapons.description: Heavy pistol with devastating stopping power at close range.

weapons.name: Carbine
weapons.description: Compact rifle favored by scouts and support teams.

weapons.name: Shotgun
weapons.description: Devastating at close quarters. All shots must target the same figure.

weapons.name: Sniper Rifle
weapons.description: Precision weapon granting +1 to hit if the firer does not move.

weapons.name: Light Machine Gun
weapons.description: Squad support weapon. Suffers -1 to hit when moving.

weapons.name: Incinerator
weapons.description: Fires a gout of flame. Area weapon, not subject to Rapid Fire or Malfunction.

weapons.name: Hyper Blaster
weapons.description: Energy weapon that malfunctions if all three firing dice show the same number.

weapons.name: Plasma Rifle
weapons.description: Superheated plasma bolts that ignore saving throws.

weapons.name: Boarding Sword
weapons.description: Close-quarters blade granting +2 to Brawling rolls.

weapons.name: Power Claw
weapons.description: Powered gauntlet granting +2 to Brawling rolls with increased damage.

weapons.name: Flash Grenade
weapons.description: Stuns any target within 2" of the target point on a 3+ roll.

weapons.name: Mounted Launcher
weapons.description: May fire any grenade type carried up to its range.

focused.name: Focused
focused.description: All shots must be directed against a single target.

aimed.name: Aimed
aimed.description: Grants +1 Hit bonus if the firer does not move.

area.name: Area
area.description: Resolve Shots against the target, then roll 1D6 for every figure within 2". On a 4+, they are hit. Not subject to Rapid Fire or Malfunction. Instead, a separate D6 scores 1 = out of ammo.

stun.name: Stun
stun.description: Stuns any target within 2" of the target point on a 3+ roll.

launcher.name: Launcher
launcher.description: May fire any grenade type carried up to the range indicated.

overheat.name: Overheat
overheat.description: Malfunctions if all three firing dice score the same number. If fewer than three dice are rolled, no malfunction chance.
